context_notes: Session 2 (2026-04-22) completed Tasks 7+8a of /gsd-new-milestone v2.0. Scope confirmation via 2 AskUserQuestion rounds (4+3 questions) landed on Aggressive GA + 4 Defer promotions + private corpora P1 + novel UX gates. REQUIREMENTS.md (c2604b5) has 14 categories (SHARD/DID/GOV/VOCAB/PRINCIPLE/LLM/SHACL/STORAGE/SPARQL/UI/CORPUS/OBS/SEC/QUALITY) with 90+ REQ-IDs. ROADMAP.md (e2a7980 WIP) has 23 phases (Phase 0 + 1-20 + 13.5 + 18.5, plus sub-phases 6.2/6.3/9.P1-7/15.*/16.*). All P1 REQ-IDs mapped (0 orphans); P2 REQ-IDs mapped as stretch. Context paused at ~79% (34% remaining) before Task 8b review round to avoid running out mid-iteration. Session 2 did NOT run ROADMAP approval loop; that's the first action for session 3.
